title: Lean Construction Institute — Last Planner System
relevance: Defines LPS should/can/will/did/learn conversations, make-ready planning, constraint management, PPC, reasons for variance.

title: Lean Construction Institute — LPS Constraint Log PDF
relevance: Defines constraint as item/requirement preventing an activity from starting, advancing, or completing; defines constraint log and 6-week make-ready review posture.

title: Oracle Primavera Cloud — Assign a Constraint to a Task
relevance: Supports linking constraints to tasks and tracking status, responsible owner, promised/needed/delivered dates, overdue and needed-within-7-days indicators.

title: Oracle Primavera Cloud — Deliver a Constraint
relevance: Supports delivered-date and delivered-status concepts for constraint resolution.

title: Oracle Primavera Cloud REST API — Constraint fields
relevance: Documents constraint types including access, design issue, documents, equipment, labor/crews, materials, QA/QC.

title: PMI — Risk Analysis and Management
relevance: Supports probability, impact, risk classification, customer/contract factors, and risk response plan concepts.

title: PMI — Qualitative Risk Assessment
relevance: Supports probability-impact matrix, 5x5 arrays, risk bands, and impact-weighted severity.

title: PMI — Project Risk Management
relevance: Supports risk response strategies, monitoring, re-evaluation, watch lists, and risk register updates.

title: NIST SP 800-30 Rev. 1 — Guide for Conducting Risk Assessments
relevance: Supports identifying, estimating, prioritizing, monitoring, and maintaining risk assessments.

title: ISO 31000:2018 Risk management guidelines
relevance: Supports integrated, structured, customized, inclusive, dynamic, best-available-information, human/cultural, continual-improvement principles.

title: Procore — Coordination Issues Dashboard
relevance: Supports dashboard charts by status, progress by location, ball-in-court by assignee company, and chart-click filtering.

title: Procore — In-Progress status for Coordination Issues
relevance: Supports status granularity, accountability, communication, and audit trail for issue resolution lifecycle.

title: Autodesk Build — Issue Root Causes
relevance: Supports root-cause categories, default categories coordination/design/quality/safety, and customizable root causes.

title: Autodesk Build — Search, Sort, and Filter Issues
relevance: Supports issue filtering by ID, category, type, status, location, assignee, watchers, dates, due date, root cause, creator, custom fields.

title: Autodesk Build — Issue Reports
relevance: Supports report fields, XLSX/PDF export posture, grouping, sorting, locations, root causes, comments, and references.

title: Construction Industry Institute — Advanced Work Packaging Overview
relevance: Supports linking constraints to work packages and construction-driven planning for predictable execution.

title: CII — Advanced Work Packaging: Design through Workface Execution
relevance: Supports work packaging through design, procurement, construction, startup, and turnover for improved productivity and predictability.

title: AACE 29R-03 Forensic Schedule Analysis overview
relevance: Supports guardrail that Wave 12 may flag delay exposure but must not perform forensic schedule analysis or legal/claim determinations.
